title: Ice And Fire Tweaker
description: Adds CraftTweaker Support for Ice And Fire
body:
## Requires [Ice and Fire: Dragons](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ice-and-fire-dragons) and [Citadel](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/citadel)

Ice And Fire Tweaker is an Addon for CraftTweaker and Ice And Fire adding CraftTweaker support for the Ice And Fire DragonForge.

The documentation can be found here

If you would like to support me in my modding endeavors, you can become a patron via **[![Patreon logo](https://i.imgur.com/CAJuExT.png) Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/jaredlll08)**. Use code [JARED](https://nodecraft.com/r/jared) for 30% off your first month of service!**
